text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black receives soul-shattering news from
Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Satono Diamond hasn't shown signs of
being race-ready, she has no choice but to give
up on debuting alongside Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The best of friends now have to travel separate
paths, and their promise of running together in
the Triple Crown will never come to pass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Kitasan Black decides to act as an older
sister figure to Satono Diamond and help guide
her toward her debut next year.
